'''Tivin''' was a major [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Algara II]] located on the continent of [[Kreesis]]. A number of [[Imperial Resistance]] cells operated in the city.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
